reviews.comment:
Buena atención. Horario limitado, no atienden en la noche. No cuenta con confitería en el lugar, la misma está contiguo sobre una lomada, toda parquizada, bella vista desde lo alto.

(Translated by Google)
Good service. Limited hours, they don't serve at night. There's no confectionery shop on the premises; it's next door on a hill, all landscaped, with a beautiful view from the top.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14085656854126721512/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTaTVUSWl3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Ojo... el lugar no se ve desde la ruta. Cuesta encontrarlo... a pesar de que está al lado del camping del ACA.

(Translated by Google)
Heads up... the place isn't visible from the road. It's hard to find... even though it's right next to the ACA campground.

reviews.comment:
Fantástica vista sobre el Valle de Cachi. Restaurante, Hosteria y pileta entre algunas de las comodidades. Un lugar muy singular que merece ser visitado.

(Translated by Google)
Fantastic views of the Cachi Valley. A restaurant, inn, and pool are just some of the amenities. A very unique place worth a visit.
